meta.gdprClause: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purposes necessary to carry out the recruitment process in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (GDPR).

basics.name: Kamil Kacperek
basics.label: Frontend Developer
basics.summary: Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience in TypeScript and React. Skilled in Next.js and building interactive 2D/3D web applications using Three.js and PixiJS.

work.summary: Responsible for the end-to-end development and maintenance of interactive web applications. Started with core front-end technologies (HTML, JS, SCSS) and later specialized in building advanced React and Next.js applications with 2D and 3D visualization components.
highlights: Designed and implemented front-end components in React and Next.js using TypeScript.
Developed interactive 2D and 3D visualizations with Three.js and PixiJS to support product configurators.
Created and deployed an internal admin panel template adopted as a standard across the company.
Developed a mobile application using Capacitor.js, providing support for both Android and iOS platforms.
Implemented reusable Web Components to enable the integration of interactive modules across different applications.

work.summary: Worked with patients in a clinical environment, requiring strong interpersonal skills, teamwork, and the ability to make decisions under time pressure. This experience significantly enhanced my communication and organizational skills, which I now apply when collaborating on IT projects.
highlights: Collaborated closely with other physiotherapists to plan and conduct patient therapy sessions.
Adapted communication and treatment methods to individual patient needs.
Planned and organized therapy requiring effective team coordination.

education.institution: University School of Physical Education in Wrocław
